1.description: get Stavanger municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect AR50 category columns to find agricultural land code

3.description: select AR50 polygons filtered by the chosen agricultural category code

4.description: reduce AR50 polygons to Stavanger extent by spatial intersection with municipality geometry

5.description: get parcels (teig) in Stavanger by kommunenummer

6.description: find parcels that intersect agricultural AR50 polygons

7.description: deduplicate to one row per teigid

10.description: return teigid for the top 10 parcels

1.description: get Stavanger municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect AR50 agricultural category values (arjordbr) to find stored code for agricultural land

3.description: select AR50 polygons with the agricultural code (reduce by category) - will be limited to municipality extent later

4.description: reduce agricultural AR50 polygons to Stavanger extent by intersecting with municipality geometry

5.description: select parcels (teig) for Stavanger municipality filtered by kommunenummer

6.description: find parcels that intersect agricultural AR50 polygons within Stavanger

7.description: deduplicate parcels to one row per teig

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT objid, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Stavanger%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [arealressurskart_ar50]
SELECT DISTINCT arjordbr FROM public."0000_25833_ar50_gdb__ar50" ORDER BY arjordbr LIMIT 100;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [arealressurskart_ar50]
SELECT ogc_fid, arjordbr, wkb_geometry FROM public."0000_25833_ar50_gdb__ar50" WHERE arjordbr IN (24,25);

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 3
-- right_source: 1
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "wkb_geometry"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, representasjonspunkt, omrade, kommunenummer FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig WHERE kommunenummer = '1103';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: spatial_join
-- left_source: 5
-- right_source: 4
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "wkb_geometry"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 7: aggregate
-- source_step: 6
-- aggregation_type: "min"
-- group_by: ["teigid"]
-- metric_column: "ogc_fid"
-- metric_as: "min_ogc_fid"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 8: sort
-- source_step: 7
-- order_by: "teigid"
-- order_direction: "asc"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 9: limit
-- source_step: 8
-- limit: 10
